settings.heading: Implementation support that turns the plan into working business infrastructure
settings.text: Use implementation when the business needs setup, rollout, documentation, configuration, onboarding or delivery support after the direction is clear.

settings.heading: Where plans often stall
settings.text: Implementation support is for the practical work that needs ownership, handover and operating readiness.

settings.title: The plan is clear but no one owns delivery
settings.text: Work needs to move from recommendation into setup, documents, systems or operating steps.

settings.title: Systems or workflows need setup
settings.text: Tools, processes, registers, knowledge bases or handover assets need to be configured.

settings.title: The work requires manual delivery
settings.text: Some services need intake, review, booking or prepared delivery before they are complete.

settings.heading: Build, configure and hand over the operating pieces
settings.text: Use this page to route visitors into services that help get work done rather than only describe what should happen.

settings.title: Systems setup
settings.text: Configure tools, workflows, registers or operating structures so the business can use them.

settings.title: Documentation implementation
settings.text: Prepare documents, templates, procedures or handover packs with practical next steps.

settings.title: Business NBN readiness
settings.text: Check availability and prepare the next steps for business connectivity where relevant.

settings.heading: A practical path from request to delivery
settings.text: Implementation work is handled with clear expectations around intake, scope, delivery and handover.

settings.title: Choose the implementation pathway
settings.text: Select the service, setup support, toolkit or delivery route that matches the job.

settings.title: Complete intake or review
settings.text: Share requirements, access needs, current state and any constraints before work begins.

settings.title: Build and configure the output
settings.text: The agreed work is prepared, configured, documented or assembled for practical use.

settings.title: Handover and next steps
settings.text: Receive the output, guidance and follow-up pathway needed to put it into operation.

settings.heading: Not sure what needs to be built first?
settings.text: Send the business context, timeline, current tools and the outcome you need. Some implementation work needs intake or review before delivery can start.
settings.aside_text: Include the process, system, document or handover problem; who will use the output; and any deadlines or dependencies.

settings.heading: Start an implementation pathway
settings.text: Move from plan to practical delivery with support that keeps expectations clear.
